description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a vibrant blue base adorned with a white floral pattern throughout the upper. The shoe has a prominent white Nike Swoosh logo on both sides, white laces, and a white midsole with a slightly translucent outsole. The tongue is padded and displays an orange Nike logo tag, while the collar and interior lining are cushioned for comfort. The overall construction appears to be a mix of synthetic textile and leather, with reinforced stitching along stress points. The shoe is designed for both style and support, making it suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A blue high-top sneaker with a white floral pattern, white Nike Swoosh, and orange logo tag, featuring white laces and a cushioned collar.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full Nike Swoosh, floral pattern, and high-top silhouette.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white laces, toe box floral design, and orange Nike logo on the tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible Swoosh, floral print, and clean white midsole.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel structure, back seam, and padded collar.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on both sides; orange Nike logo tag on tongue
